creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 242634
git format-patch -1 main

- Update 6.10 -> 6.12
Changelog: https://metacpan.org/release/JKEENAN/Devel-NYTProf-6.12/source/Changes

- "portlint -AC" is happy.
- "portclippy Makefile" is happy.
- "portfmt -D Makefile" is happy.
- Tested with:
13.2-RELEASE
portlint 2.20.0
portfmt 1.1.4
pkg 1.19.1
poudriere 3.3.7_1
perl 5.32.1_3
openssl 1.1.1t
ssl=base
- built-in perl tests in a clean poudriere jail say: PASS.
